summary: Invite System MVP tested successfully. All 14 backend API tests passed. Frontend InvitePage works at /join?invite=CODE and /invite/CODE routes. InviteSection is located in collapsible community section of HomeTab. Backend endpoints confirmed working: /api/invites/me, /api/invites/generate, /api/invites/redeem, /api/invites/share, /api/invites/lookup/{code}. Analytics events tracked correctly: invite_generated, invite_viewed, invite_shared, invite_redeemed, invite_accepted, trust_change with source=invite_used.

issues: InviteSection is nested inside collapsible community section, not immediately visible - users need to expand 'קהילה ושדה משותף' to see invite codes

critical_code_review_comments: invites.py: Clean implementation with proper auth checks, status validation, and analytics logging
auth.py registration: Correctly validates invite_code in both invite_codes (new) and invites (legacy) collections
auth.py registration: Auto-generates 2 invite codes for new users in invite_codes collection
trust_integration.py: on_invite_used correctly fires action_type=contribute, source=invite_used with impact=8, authenticity=0.9
analytics.py: log_event correctly stores all invite-related events
InviteSection.js: Properly fetches from /api/invites/me with auth token, shows auth gate when not logged in
InvitePage.js: Correctly loads invite details via /api/invites/lookup/{code} and displays inviter_alias

success_rate.frontend: 100% (InvitePage loads correctly at both routes, API integration works)

verified_endpoints.GET /api/invites/me: 200 with auth - returns codes list, active_count, used_count, can_generate; 401 without auth
verified_endpoints.POST /api/invites/generate: 200 - creates codes up to MAX_ACTIVE_CODES=2, returns success=false when at limit
verified_endpoints.POST /api/invites/redeem: 200 - marks code used, links users, fires trust+analytics; 400 for self-redeem; 400 for double-redeem; 404 for invalid code
verified_endpoints.GET /api/invites/lookup/{code}: 200 - returns code details with inviter_alias from new or legacy collection; 404 for invalid

verified_frontend_components.InvitePage: Renders at /join?invite=CODE and /invite/CODE, shows inviter_alias, accept/skip buttons
verified_frontend_components.InviteSection: Located in HomeTab community section, requires auth, shows codes with copy functionality

context_for_next_testing_agent: Invite System MVP fully functional. New codes stored in invite_codes collection (schema: code, owner_user_id, status, created_at, used_at, used_by_user_id). Legacy invites collection still supported for backward compatibility in lookup. MAX_ACTIVE_CODES=2 per user. InviteSection requires user to expand 'קהילה ושדה משותף' (community section) in HomeTab to see their codes. Trust event fires with source='invite_used' giving inviter +8 impact, 0.9 authenticity.

mocked_apis.note: All APIs use real database operations - no mocking
